notes: v0.14.8 — SHOP rebuilt to Categories Tabs (mockup #2 port): left rail with 4 tabs (SHIP SKINS / BOSS KEYS / BOOSTERS / COSMETICS — last 2 Coming Soon), right detail panel that swaps per tab. SHIP SKINS view split into UNLOCKED (PRISM, CIPHER) + PREMIUM (VOID, NEXUS) sections in a 2-column grid. Click owned = equip, click locked with enough PULSE = buy + auto-equip. shop_tab persists across page loads. Wallet line on top (PULSE · SURGE · KEYS). Class-coloured glow: every ship/avatar draw now bleeds a soft halo tinted by the active class accent (SHARD cyan + the three locked classes' colors waiting for their kits). Windows only.
